# @chaos/agent-loop

> Provider-agnostic autonomous agent loop for JavaScript/TypeScript, built on Vercel AI SDK.

The agent loop calls streamText() repeatedly, executing tools each iteration, until the model responds with text only (no tool calls) or the iteration limit is reached.

## Install

```bash
npm install @chaos/agent-loop ai zod
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { createAgent } from '@chaos/agent-loop';
import { anthropic } from '@ai-sdk/anthropic';
import { tool } from 'ai';
import { z } from 'zod';

const agent = createAgent({
  id: 'my-agent',
  name: 'My Agent',
  model: anthropic('claude-sonnet-4-5'),
  systemPrompt: 'You are a helpful assistant.',
  tools: {
    get_weather: tool({
      description: 'Get weather for a city.',
      inputSchema: z.object({ city: z.string() }),
      execute: async ({ city }) => `Sunny, 22C in ${city}`,
    }),
  },
  maxIterations: 10,
});

// Run to completion
const result = await agent.run('What is the weather in Tokyo?');

// Or stream progress
for await (const event of agent.stream('What is the weather in Tokyo?')) {
  console.log(event.type, event.content);
}
```

## API

### createAgent(config: AgentConfig): Agent

Create an agent instance.

```typescript
interface AgentConfig {
  id: string;                    // Unique identifier
  name: string;                  // Human-readable name
  model: LanguageModel;          // Vercel AI SDK model (e.g. anthropic('claude-sonnet-4-5'))
  systemPrompt?: string;         // System prompt / CLAUDE.md content
  tools?: ToolSet;               // Vercel AI SDK tools
  skills?: SkillStore;           // Skill store for dynamic skills
  maxIterations?: number;        // Max outer loop iterations (default: 20)
  innerStepLimit?: number;       // Max tool calls per streamText call (default: 5)
  hooks?: AgentHooks;            // Lifecycle hooks
  permissions?: PermissionConfig; // Tool permission config
  usage?: {
    enabled?: boolean;           // Track usage (default: true)
    pricing?: PricingTable;      // Custom pricing (default: DEFAULT_PRICING)
    limits?: {
      perRun?: number;           // Max USD per run
      perDay?: number;           // Max USD per day
    };
    onLimitExceeded?: (event: { type: string; spent: number; limit: number }) => Promise<boolean>;
  };
  signal?: AbortSignal;          // Abort signal
}
```

### Agent

```typescript
interface Agent {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly name: string;
  run(task: string, context?: string): Promise<string>;
  stream(task: string, context?: string): AsyncIterable<ProgressEvent>;
  abort(): void;
}
```

### ProgressEvent

```typescript
interface ProgressEvent {
  type: 'thinking' | 'tool-call' | 'tool-result' | 'text' | 'step-complete' | 'done' | 'error';
  content: string;
  toolName?: string;
  toolArgs?: unknown;
  toolResult?: unknown;
  step?: number;
  totalSteps?: number;
}
```

### Lower-Level Loop Functions

```typescript
// Run to completion, get full result
function runAgentLoop(config: AgentConfig, task: string, context?: string): Promise<RunResult>;

// Stream progress events
function streamAgentLoop(config: AgentConfig, task: string, context?: string): AsyncGenerator<ProgressEvent>;

interface RunResult {
  text: string;
  usage: RunUsage;
  steps: number;
  aborted: boolean;
}

interface RunUsage {
  totalInputTokens: number;
  totalOutputTokens: number;
  totalCost: number;
  steps: number;
  records: UsageRecord[];
}
```

### Tools

Tools use Vercel AI SDK's `tool()` function:

```typescript
import { tool } from 'ai';
import { z } from 'zod';

const myTool = tool({
  description: 'What the tool does',
  inputSchema: z.object({ param: z.string() }),
  execute: async ({ param }) => `Result for ${param}`,
});
```

#### createFileTools(store: MemoryStore, agentId: string): ToolSet

Creates file tools backed by a MemoryStore: `read_file`, `write_file`, `list_directory`, `delete_file`, `grep_file`, `find_files`.

```typescript
import { createFileTools } from '@chaos/agent-loop';
import { InMemoryMemoryStore } from '@chaos/sdk/stores/in-memory';

const tools = createFileTools(new InMemoryMemoryStore(), 'agent-id');
```

### Skills

Skills inject instructions into the system prompt. They are not executable tools -- they provide domain knowledge.

```typescript
interface Skill {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  content: string;      // Instructions injected into system prompt
  author?: string;
  version?: string;
}

interface SkillStore {
  list(): Promise<Skill[]>;
  get(skillId: string): Promise<Skill | undefined>;
  install(skill: Skill): Promise<void>;
  remove(skillId: string): Promise<void>;
  search(query: string): Promise<Array<{ id: string; name: string; description: string; url?: string }>>;
}
```

Built-in: `InMemorySkillStore` implements `SkillStore`.

Parse SKILL.md files (YAML frontmatter + markdown body):

```typescript
import { parseSkillMd } from '@chaos/agent-loop';
const skill = parseSkillMd('---\nname: Review\ndescription: Code review\n---\nReview instructions...');
```

`createSkillTools(store: SkillStore): ToolSet` -- creates `search_skills`, `install_skill`, `list_skills`, `remove_skill` tools.

`buildSkillsPrompt(skills: Skill[]): string` -- formats skills for system prompt injection.

### Hooks

```typescript
interface AgentHooks {
  onPreToolUse?: (event: PreToolUseEvent) => Promise<HookDecision | void>;
  onPostToolUse?: (event: PostToolUseEvent) => Promise<void>;
  onStepStart?: (event: StepStartEvent) => Promise<HookDecision | void>;
  onStepComplete?: (event: StepCompleteEvent) => Promise<void>;
  onComplete?: (event: CompleteEvent) => Promise<void>;
  onUsage?: (record: UsageRecord) => Promise<void>;
}

interface PreToolUseEvent { toolName: string; args: unknown; step: number; }
interface PostToolUseEvent { toolName: string; args: unknown; result: unknown; step: number; durationMs: number; }
interface StepStartEvent { step: number; totalSteps: number; tokensSoFar: number; costSoFar: number; }
interface StepCompleteEvent { step: number; hasToolCalls: boolean; text: string; }
interface CompleteEvent { result: string; totalSteps: number; usage: RunUsage; aborted: boolean; }

interface HookDecision {
  decision: 'allow' | 'deny' | 'ask' | 'stop' | 'continue';
  reason?: string;
  modifiedArgs?: unknown;  // onPreToolUse only: replace tool args
}
```

Example -- block dangerous commands:

```typescript
hooks: {
  onPreToolUse: async ({ toolName, args }) => {
    if (toolName === 'run_command' && (args as any).command.includes('rm -rf')) {
      return { decision: 'deny', reason: 'Destructive command blocked' };
    }
  },
  onStepStart: async ({ costSoFar }) => {
    if (costSoFar > 1.0) return { decision: 'stop', reason: 'Budget exceeded' };
  },
}
```

### Permissions

```typescript
type PermissionMode = 'accept-all' | 'deny-all' | 'ask';
type PermissionLevel = 'always' | 'ask' | 'never';

interface PermissionConfig {
  mode: PermissionMode;
  tools?: Record<string, PermissionLevel>;  // per-tool overrides
  onPermissionRequest?: (request: { toolName: string; args: unknown }) => Promise<boolean>;
}
```

Evaluation order:
1. Mode `'accept-all'` -> allow (unless per-tool `'never'`)
2. Mode `'deny-all'` -> deny (unless per-tool `'always'`)
3. Mode `'ask'` -> check per-tool override, then call `onPermissionRequest` (default: allow)

```typescript
import { evaluatePermission } from '@chaos/agent-loop';
const allowed = await evaluatePermission('write_file', { path: '/tmp/x' }, {
  mode: 'ask',
  tools: { write_file: 'always' },
});
// allowed === true
```

### Usage

```typescript
import { UsageTracker, estimateCost, DEFAULT_PRICING } from '@chaos/agent-loop';

// Estimate cost
const cost = estimateCost('claude-sonnet-4-5', 1000, 500);

// Track usage across steps
const tracker = new UsageTracker({ perRunLimit: 0.50 });
const record = tracker.record(0, 'claude-sonnet-4-5', 1000, 500);
const summary = tracker.getSummary();
const ok = await tracker.checkLimits(); // false if limit exceeded

// DEFAULT_PRICING covers: Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, Groq, Perplexity, local
// Type: Record<string, { input: number; output: number }>  (per 1M tokens, USD)
```

### Testing

Import from `@chaos/agent-loop/testing`:

```typescript
import { createMockModel } from '@chaos/agent-loop/testing';

const model = createMockModel({
  responses: [
    { toolCalls: [{ toolName: 'read_file', args: { path: 'data.txt' } }] },
    { text: 'The file contains: hello world' },
  ],
  modelId: 'mock-model',
  inputTokensPerCall: 10,
  outputTokensPerCall: 20,
});

const agent = createAgent({
  id: 'test',
  name: 'Test',
  model,
  tools: { read_file: myReadFileTool },
});

const result = await agent.run('Read data.txt');
```

`MockModelOptions`:
- `responses: MockResponse[]` -- predetermined responses, used in order, last one repeats
- `modelId?: string` -- defaults to `'mock-model'`
- `provider?: string` -- defaults to `'mock-provider'`
- `inputTokensPerCall?: number` -- defaults to `10`
- `outputTokensPerCall?: number` -- defaults to `20`

`MockResponse`:
- `text?: string` -- text response
- `toolCalls?: Array<{ toolName: string; args: Record<string, unknown> }>` -- tool calls
